notes: Last-accepted Tier 1 (deterministic, offline-hash) retrieval scores over data/eval/dataset.json. A run FAILS the CI gate if recall_at_k or mrr drops below its value minus tolerance (floor 0.95). The Tier 1 pipeline is fully deterministic, so tolerance absorbs only float noise, not real variance; it exists so the gate mechanism is correct the moment a non-deterministic (e.g. Voyage-backed) tier is added. Updating these numbers is a deliberate, reviewed human change (confirm the gain is real) - a passing run never rewrites this file. See ADR 0017.
